_comment: License allowlist for tools/validate-licenses.ts (W0 task 9 / F119). Production deps must resolve to a license string that contains at least one of `allowed`. Anything matching `blocked` fails CI immediately. Unknown licenses (neither allowed nor blocked) require an explicit entry in `exceptions` with reason+addedBy+addedAt. The 90-day staleness convention from dead-code-allowlist.json applies here too: exceptions unchanged for 90 days surface as 'stale; re-justify'.

exceptions.reason: Dual-licensed MIT/GPL-3.0-or-later. We use under MIT. Upstream package.json declares both; license-checker picks the GPL side. Confirmed MIT acceptance in https://github.com/Stuk/jszip/blob/main/LICENSE.markdown.
Transitive dep (substack/node-bufferlist). Upstream README + repo declare MIT; package.json predates SPDX standardization and has a non-standard license field. Treated as MIT.
